noteArchitectureCloseout.resultSummary: Recorded the GH-AW Safe Outputs specification as a NOTE-mode Architecture source. The retained value is a bounded set of Engine-facing patterns for declarative operation contracts, validation ordering, sanitization boundaries, provenance, error catalogs, and deferred execution gates; direct GitHub-output operationalization and deeper Architecture materialization remain intentionally unopened from this slice.
